_doc: Generic LLM driver — OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, xAI, Gemini and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. For local Ollama use the dedicated Ollama driver.
label: Generic LLM
description: Connects to cloud and local LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, Gemini, Groq, Mistral, DeepSeek, LM Studio…) — check status, list models and run chat completions.

provider.label: Provider
provider.description: LLM provider — pick from the list or type a custom value

model.label: Model
model.description: Model name — type or pick from the list (varies by provider)

base_url.label: Base URL
base_url.description: API base URL — leave empty to use provider default

credential.label: Credential
credential.description: Secret from the triv secrets store — takes priority over API Key below

api_key.label: API Key (inline)
api_key.description: API key stored directly — prefer using a named Credential instead

llm-chat.label: Chat
llm-chat.command: # HTTP POST ${env.base_url}/chat/completions — prompt via request body {"prompt": "..."}
